stages.label: Pracharaka Training
stages.description: Train and onboard the Pracharaka referral partner on the Sadaika programme, referral process, commission terms, and patient selection criteria.
requiredActions: Briefing on programme eligibility criteria conducted
Commission structure and payment process explained
nextActions: Pracharaka identifies suitable patient and initiates wish list entry

stages.label: Patient Wish List
stages.description: Referred patient is added to the Panchakarma wish list. Basic demographic details, chief complaint, and motivation are captured.
requiredActions: Patient full name, age and gender recorded
Chief complaint and health motivation documented
Referring Pracharaka linked to patient record
nextActions: Assign to Ayurveda doctor for astrochart eligibility assessment

stages.label: Astrochart Eligibility
stages.description: Ayurveda doctor evaluates the patient's constitutional type (Prakriti), astrological compatibility with Panchakarma timing, and renders an eligibility verdict.
requiredActions: Patient birth date and place obtained
Astrological compatibility with Panchakarma timing evaluated
Eligibility verdict documented: Eligible / Deferred / Not Recommended
nextActions: If not recommended: close case with notes
stages.sla: Within 3 working days of wish list entry

stages.label: Screening Consultation
stages.description: Comprehensive medical review screening the patient for suitability for Panchakarma. Contraindications, current medications and baseline health are assessed.
nextActions: If cleared: proceed to treatment planning
If more info required: request additional investigations
stages.sla: Within 5 working days of eligibility confirmation

stages.label: Treatment Planning
stages.description: Ayurveda doctor formulates a personalised Panchakarma protocol specifying procedures, duration, dietary guidelines, herbal formulations and cost estimate.
requiredActions: Treatment plan document signed by doctor
nextActions: Schedule PK consultation with patient to present and sign off the treatment plan
stages.sla: Within 3 working days of screening clearance

stages.label: PK Consultation
stages.description: Doctor conducts a detailed video or in-person consultation with the patient, presents the treatment plan, addresses questions, and obtains written informed consent.
requiredActions: Consultation scheduled and confirmed with patient
nextActions: Coordinator to confirm reservation and collect deposit
stages.sla: Within 7 days of treatment plan approval

stages.label: Reservation Fee
stages.description: Programme dates are confirmed, accommodation is allocated at the centre, and the 30% advance booking deposit is collected from the patient.
requiredActions: Programme start and end dates confirmed with patient
stages.sla: Within 48 hours of PK consultation sign-off

stages.label: Patient Portal Access
stages.description: Patient's secure portal account is created, login credentials are shared, required pre-programme forms are completed, and critical documents are uploaded.
requiredActions: Login credentials sent securely to patient
Treatment plan and consent uploaded to portal
Orientation kit sent to patient email
nextActions: Patient to confirm travel arrangements and prepare for programme
stages.sla: Within 3 working days of reservation confirmed

stages.label: Travel Preparation
stages.description: Patient's travel itinerary is confirmed, airport / station pickup is arranged if required, and the final pre-arrival checklist is sent.
requiredActions: Flight or train booking details obtained
Final pre-arrival checklist sent to patient
nextActions: Collect balance payment before programme commencement
stages.sla: At least 21 days before programme start

stages.label: Advance Payment
stages.description: Remaining 70% programme fee is collected from the patient. Payment receipt is issued and all financial records are updated.
requiredActions: Balance programme fee requested from patient
Programme fully confirmed to patient in writing
nextActions: Patient arrival and formal admission at the centre
stages.sla: At least 14 days before programme start

stages.label: Arrival & Admission
stages.description: Patient arrives at the Panchakarma centre. Formal admission procedures are completed, room is allocated, therapist is assigned and Poorvakarma commences.
requiredActions: Patient received at centre and identity verified
Room allocated and key handed over

stages.label: Panchakarma Treatment
stages.description: Patient undergoes the full Panchakarma treatment programme. Daily therapy logs are maintained, mid-programme review is conducted, and post-programme care plan is prepared.
nextActions: Conduct quality control review and collect patient feedback
